meta.title: What you need to know about Russia's drones entering Poland
meta.description:
According to Polish officials, Russian military drones crossed over into Polish airspace from Belarus at least 19 times overnight, prompting NATO fighters to engage at least three of these drones to bring them down, as Russia continues to escalate its attacks against Ukraine. Now, Poland has invoked Article 4 of the NATO charter, which effectively triggers active discussion among NATO members about a threat that may warrant action from the alliance.
